task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: 15-6-023 S&S measure media steps in presentation print mode [Special Tests]

desc.p: S&S measure media steps in presentation print mode

section.title: Description
section.p: S&S measure media steps in presentation print mode.
This test prints one white bitmap on IJM613 that is at least 60" wide, with media step markers and yellow markers enabled. The print mode is Presentation.
The test will fail if media of other type or smaller than 60" is used.
Custom media calibration must have been executed first, and for the same media type. Start with fresh media. If the media has stayed on the print surface for some time, clean cut first.
Switch “”winding on”” before starting this test.
